tests.risk_if_missing: Users can trigger fill with an empty profile and get no meaningful guidance.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the empty-form smoke fixture in regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Real pages often mix pre-filled and empty values; overwrite behavior is unknown.
Readonly or locked CRM fields can throw errors or misleadingly report success.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the readonly and disabled regression fixture.

tests.risk_if_missing: Long-form notes fields may not map cleanly even though textarea is queried.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep textarea in the empty-form fixture.

tests.risk_if_missing: Many lead forms use selects for country, industry, or source; current package likely cannot fill them.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the select fixture in smoke regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Core contact data could fail silently.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the current browser smoke assertion.

tests.risk_if_missing: Phone is explicitly mentioned in demand evidence and currently only verified on one fixture.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the current browser smoke assertion and add alternate label variants.

tests.risk_if_missing: First/last name mapping is central to the wedge value proposition.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the current browser smoke assertion.

tests.risk_if_missing: The extension may report success while doing nothing useful on unsupported forms.
Extension action invocation is the only authorized fill trigger path.
Any remote storage regression would break the privacy promise and review positioning.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep a static test that forbids network calls in popup code.

tests.risk_if_missing: Failures become opaque and users cannot tell whether anything happened.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep feedback verification in smoke regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Without delete/reset, users cannot recover from bad saved data cleanly.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep popup profile management in smoke regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Current fill path always writes values and could clobber operator edits.
Users may not trust the action if the popup does not confirm what happened clearly.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep popup feedback verification in smoke regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Users cannot tell when the free limit is approaching or exhausted.
tests.recommended_next_action: Verify the free usage counter decreases on each core action.

tests.risk_if_missing: The commercial wedge could overpromise unlimited usage to free users.
tests.recommended_next_action: Exhaust the free fills and verify the paywall appears with the upgrade CTA.

tests.risk_if_missing: Users could pay externally but still fail to activate or restore access cleanly.
tests.recommended_next_action: Verify activate, verify, restore, and invalid-license states in the license UI.

tests.risk_if_missing: A stale paid cache could become a permanent unlock or leak sensitive license details.
tests.recommended_next_action: Verify offline grace expires and the extension falls back to free until reverified.

recommended_next_tests: Add label-variant coverage for alternate field descriptors such as mobile, organization, and region.
Add a multi-step form regression once the single-step smoke suite is stable.
Add manual tester verification on a real CRM page before another publish cycle.
